title: Wynntils MCD Player List
description: Minecraft Dungeons inspired Player List for Wynntils
body:
### Minecraft Dungeons inspired Player List for Wynntils
The Minecraft Dungeons-inspired Player List for Wynntils. There are two versions available: one with a highlighted Guild list section, and one without it.

| With Guild Highlight | Without Guild Highlight |
|:---------------------:|:---------------------:|
| ![Preview](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ca05ac777bcd3130debb0ee136a7f45d0411e940.webp) | ![Preview Wo/ GHighlight](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d0a608cd6c10c7ec9c6a94373a792d1e68ea1492.webp) |
